calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Warringtons Motion Requesting Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Matthew J. Olsman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Leslie Warrington, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendants 408 Clement St, LLC, and Conor Nugent,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $49,250.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,846.88
Attorney's Fees: $1,100.00
Costs: $605.35
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,802.23

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Continued To Aug-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
